name: Ranch Style Taco Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute ground beef and drain well.
2. Set aside to cool.
3. Tear lettuce into pieces.
4. Dice tomatoes and onion.
5. Grate cheese.
6. Drain beans.
7. Break corn chips into smaller pieces.
8. Chop avocado and sprinkle with lemon juice, lightly tossing to coat.
9. Toss together all ingredients except corn chips.
10. Top with chips just before serving.
